name: io.github.buildepicshit/wick
title: Wick
description: Roslyn-enriched C# exception telemetry for Godot Engine. Captures crashes from Godot C# games and hands the AI full source context (method body, caller chain, scene state) in a single MCP call. Requires .NET 10 SDK and the Godot bridge addon from the main repo.

environmentVariables.name: WICK_GODOT_BIN
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to your Godot 4.6.1+ binary (with .NET/Mono support).

environmentVariables.name: WICK_PROJECT_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to your Godot project root (the directory containing project.godot).

environmentVariables.name: WICK_GROUPS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated tool pillars to activate: core, runtime, csharp, build, scene. Or 'all'. Defaults to 'core'.
